title: Director/ Head of Global Fertiliser & Agricultural Commodities Trading #82136
description:
Job Description

  • Industry/ Organization Type: Agricultural Commodities Wholesale
  • Position Title: Director/ Head of Global Fertiliser & Agricultural Commodities Trading
  • Working Location: Somerset
  • Working Hours: 5 days (Monday – Friday, 9:00 AM - 6:30 PM)
  • Salary Package: Basic Salary + AWS + Bonus
  • Duration: Permanent Role

Key Responsibilities

  • Define and implement the global fertiliser trading strategy, including a multi-year plan covering key products, regions, and trade routes.
  • Build and manage a diversified fertiliser portfolio across nitrogen, sulphur, and related products using spot, term, and structured trades.
  • Establish and manage strategic supply partnerships and offtake arrangements with producers, buyers, distributors, and government entities.
  • Lead market intelligence by monitoring global supply-demand trends, crop cycles, geopolitical developments, and regulatory and sustainability factors.
  • Originate, negotiate, and execute physical fertiliser trades, managing the full trade lifecycle from contracting to delivery.
  • Identify and optimise regional trading and arbitrage opportunities, using Singapore as the central trading hub.
  • Manage trading performance, profitability, and capital efficiency in coordination with risk management and internal policies.
  • Build and maintain strong relationships with global counterparties and represent the company at industry events when required.
  • Develop and mentor the fertiliser trading team, setting performance standards and promoting a high-performance, ethical trading culture.
  • Perform any other ad-hoc duties as assigned.

APPLY NOW!!!

  • Bachelor’s degree in agriculture, economics, business, engineering, or a related field.
  • Minimum 10 years of experience in fertiliser or agricultural commodities trading.
  • Experience in building and managing global fertiliser trading portfolios from a major trading hub.
  • Good understanding of global fertiliser markets, including pricing, logistics, and agriculture-related demand.
  • Knowledge of physical trading, shipping operations, and international contracts.
  • Ability to manage both short-term trading performance and long-term business growth.
  • Self-motivated and comfortable working in a fast-growing business environment.
  • Strong leadership, negotiation, and relationship management skills.
  • Ability to work effectively in a diverse and international environment based in Singapore.

Kindly apply through ANY of the following methods:

  • Submit your application by clicking the APPLY button;
  • Email your resume to Job@anradus.com.sg. Please indicate #82136 on the email subject.

Anradus Application Policy: We value each application and ensure every resume is reviewed. Our process is efficient, typically concluding within 3 working days. If you do not receive communication from us within this timeframe, it's likely that your application has not been shortlisted by our client. In such cases, we recommend continuing your job search to maximize your opportunities.
